summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Vastgoed Kiosk virtual keyboard functionality. All 12 features tested and working correctly. Virtual keyboard opens/closes with toggle button, fills full width of right panel (1152px), typing works on all input fields (email, password, name, phone) with both virtual and physical keyboards, backspace (Wis) removes characters, OK button triggers form submission, register mode shows additional fields, error handling works correctly, and login flow works with valid credentials.

test_results.virtual_keyboard_toggle: PASS - Toggle button 'Schermtoetsenbord (touchscreen)' shows/hides keyboard correctly
test_results.keyboard_width: PASS - Keyboard fills full width of right panel (1152px width measured)
test_results.virtual_keyboard_email: PASS - Virtual keyboard typing works on email field
test_results.virtual_keyboard_password: PASS - Virtual keyboard typing works on password field
test_results.physical_keyboard_email: PASS - Physical keyboard typing works on email field
test_results.physical_keyboard_password: PASS - Physical keyboard typing works on password field
test_results.active_field_switching: PASS - Clicking different fields changes active virtual keyboard target (border-orange-500 indicator)
test_results.backspace_wis_button: PASS - Wis button removes last character correctly
test_results.ok_button_submission: PASS - OK button triggers form submission, shows error for invalid credentials
test_results.register_mode_fields: PASS - Register mode shows name (Bedrijfsnaam) and phone (Telefoon) fields
test_results.register_name_field: PASS - Virtual keyboard works on name field in register mode
test_results.register_phone_field: PASS - Virtual keyboard works on phone field in register mode
test_results.error_handling: PASS - Error message 'Ongeldige inloggegevens' shown for invalid login, no React crashes
test_results.registration_flow: PASS - New account registration works via virtual keyboard
test_results.login_flow: PASS - Login with registered account works via virtual keyboard
test_results.password_visibility_toggle: PASS - Eye icon toggles password visibility (password/text type)

features_tested: Virtual keyboard opens when clicking 'Schermtoetsenbord (touchscreen)' toggle button
Virtual keyboard fills the full width of the right panel (not constrained to max-w-lg)
Virtual keyboard typing works on email field
Virtual keyboard typing works on password field
Physical keyboard typing works on email field
Physical keyboard typing works on password field
Switching between email and password fields changes the active virtual keyboard target
Register mode shows additional fields (name, phone) that work with both keyboards
Error handling works correctly - no React crashes on form submission with invalid data
Login flow works with valid credentials via virtual keyboard
critical_code_review_comments: Virtual keyboard correctly positioned outside max-w-lg container to span full right panel width
All input fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Error handling correctly parses FastAPI validation errors (array of objects)
Physical keyboard typing works - readOnly attributes properly removed
Active field indicator (border-orange-500) provides clear visual feedback
SPATIE (space) and Wis (backspace) buttons work correctly
OK button properly triggers handleSubmit function
seed_data_creation: Created test account during registration flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vastgoed Kiosk virtual keyboard fully functional. All 12 features from the test request are working correctly. Virtual keyboard spans full width of right panel, both physical and virtual keyboard typing work on all input fields (email, password, name, phone), backspace and OK buttons work, error handling is correct, and registration/login flows work. Test account testnzf3ku@vastgoed.sr created during testing. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
